1	------------------------------- MODULE Voting -------------------------------
2	EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
3	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4	CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum
5	
6	ASSUME QuorumAssumption == 
7	    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
8	    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}
9	
10	THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
11	  PROOF OMITTED
12	
13	Ballot == Nat
14	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
15	VARIABLES votes, maxBal
16	
17	TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
18	          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
19	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
20	VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]
21	
22	DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)
23	
24	ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
25	  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b 
26	  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
27	      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
28	      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
29	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
30	Init == 
31	    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
32	    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
33	
34	IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
35	  /\ b > maxBal[a]
36	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] 
37	  /\ UNCHANGED votes
38	
39	VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
40	    /\ maxBal[a] <= b 
41	    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
42	    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
43	         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
44	    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) 
45	    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}] 
46	    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] 
47	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
48	Next == 
49	    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
50	        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
51	        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
52	
53	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
54	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
55	ChosenAt(b, v) == 
56	    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)
57	
58	chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}
59	
60	Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v} 
61	---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62	CannotVoteAt(a, b) == 
63	    /\ maxBal[a] > b
64	    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)
65	
66	NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) == 
67	    \E Q \in Quorum : 
68	        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)
69	
70	SafeAt(b, v) == 
71	    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)
72	
73	VotesSafe == 
74	    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : 
75	        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)
76	
77	OneVote == 
78	    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
79	        VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)
80	
81	OneValuePerBallot ==
82	    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
83	        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)
84	
85	Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
86	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
87	THEOREM AllSafeAtZero == \A v \in Value : SafeAt(0, v)
88	  PROOF OMITTED
89	
90	THEOREM ChoosableThm ==
91	          \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
92	             ChosenAt(b, v) => NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v)
93	  PROOF OMITTED
94	
95	THEOREM OneVoteThm == OneValuePerBallot => OneVote
96	  PROOF OMITTED
97	
98	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
99	THEOREM VotesSafeImpliesConsistency ==
100	   ASSUME VotesSafe, OneVote, chosen # {}
101	   PROVE  \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
102	  PROOF OMITTED
103	
104	THEOREM ShowsSafety ==
105	          TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot =>
106	             \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
107	               ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)
108	  PROOF OMITTED
109	
110	THEOREM SafeAtStable == Inv /\ Next /\ TypeOK' =>
111	                            \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
112	                                SafeAt(b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)'
113	  OMITTED                                
114	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
115	THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
116	  PROOF OMITTED
117	
118	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
119	THEOREM Consistent == Spec => []Consistency
120	  PROOF OMITTED
121	
122	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
123	C == INSTANCE Consensus 
124	
125	THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
126	  PROOF OMITTED
127	
128	=============================================================================
129

file.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption == 
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  PROOF OMITTED

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b 
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == 
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] 
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b 
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) 
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}] 
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == 
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) == 
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v} 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
CannotVoteAt(a, b) == 
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) == 
    \E Q \in Quorum : 
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) == 
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

VotesSafe == 
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : 
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

OneVote == 
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
        VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM AllSafeAtZero == \A v \in Value : SafeAt(0, v)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM ChoosableThm ==
          \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
             ChosenAt(b, v) => NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM OneVoteThm == OneValuePerBallot => OneVote
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM VotesSafeImpliesConsistency ==
   ASSUME VotesSafe, OneVote, chosen # {}
   PROVE  \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM ShowsSafety ==
          TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot =>
             \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
               ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtStable == Inv /\ Next /\ TypeOK' =>
                            \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                                SafeAt(b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)'
  OMITTED                                
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
  PROOF OMITTED

----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM Consistent == Spec => []Consistency
  PROOF OMITTED

----------------------------------------------------------------------------
C == INSTANCE Consensus 

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
  PROOF OMITTED

=============================================================================

1	-------------------------------- MODULE Sets --------------------------------
2	EXTENDS Integers, NaturalsInduction, TLAPS
3	
4	IsBijection(f, S, T) == /\ f \in [S -> T]
5	                        /\ \A x, y \in S : (x # y) => (f[x] # f[y])
6	                        /\ \A y \in T : \E x \in S : f[x] = y
7	
8	IsFiniteSet(S) == \E n \in Nat : \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)
9	
10	CONSTANT Cardinality(_)
11	AXIOM CardinalityAxiom ==
12	         \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) =>
13	           \A n : (n = Cardinality(S)) <=>
14	                    (n \in Nat) /\ \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)
15	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
16	
17	THEOREM CardinalityInNat == \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => Cardinality(S) \in Nat
18	  PROOF OMITTED
19	
20	------------------------------------------------------------------
21	
22	THEOREM CardinalityZero ==
23	           /\ IsFiniteSet({})
24	           /\ Cardinality({}) = 0
25	           /\ \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (Cardinality(S)=0) => (S = {})
26	  PROOF OMITTED
27	
28	THEOREM CardinalityPlusOne ==
29	    ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
30	           NEW x, x \notin S
31	    PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cup {x})
32	           /\ Cardinality(S \cup {x}) = Cardinality(S) + 1
33	  PROOF OMITTED
34	
35	------------------------------------------------------------------
36	
37	THEOREM CardinalityOne == \A m : /\ IsFiniteSet({m})
38	                                 /\ Cardinality({m}) = 1
39	  PROOF OMITTED
40	
41	THEOREM CardinalityTwo == \A m, p : m # p => 
42	                              /\ IsFiniteSet({m,p})
43	                              /\ Cardinality({m,p}) = 2
44	  PROOF OMITTED
45	
46	THEOREM IntervalCardinality ==  
47	  ASSUME NEW a \in Nat, NEW b \in Nat 
48	  PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(a..b)
49	         /\ Cardinality(a..b) = IF a > b THEN 0 ELSE b-a+1
50	  PROOF OMITTED
51	
52	------------------------------------------------------------------
53	
54	THEOREM CardinalityOneConverse ==
55	   ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S), Cardinality(S) = 1
56	   PROVE  \E m : S = {m}
57	  PROOF OMITTED
58	
59	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
60	
61	THEOREM IsBijectionInverse ==
62	  ASSUME NEW f, NEW S, NEW T, 
63	         IsBijection(f, S, T) 
64	  PROVE  \E g : IsBijection(g, T, S)
65	  PROOF OMITTED
66	
67	THEOREM IsBijectionTransitive ==
68	  ASSUME NEW f1, NEW f2, NEW S, NEW T, NEW U, 
69	           IsBijection(f1, S, U),
70	           IsBijection(f2, U, T) 
71	  PROVE  \E g : IsBijection(g, S, T)
72	  PROOF OMITTED
73	
74	THEOREM IsBijectionCardinality ==
75	  \A f, S, T : /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
76	               /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
77	               => (IsBijection(f, S, T) <=> Cardinality(S) = Cardinality(T))
78	  PROOF OMITTED
79	
80	LEMMA CardinalitySetMinus ==
81	      ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
82	             NEW x \in S
83	      PROVE /\ IsFiniteSet(S \ {x})
84	            /\ Cardinality(S \ {x}) = Cardinality(S) - 1
85	  PROOF OMITTED
86	
87	THEOREM FiniteSubset ==
88	  ASSUME NEW S, NEW TT, IsFiniteSet(TT), S \subseteq TT
89	  PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
90	         /\ Cardinality(S) \leq Cardinality(TT)
91	  PROOF OMITTED
92	
93	-------------------------------------------------------
94	
95	THEOREM CardinalityUnion ==
96	          \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ IsFiniteSet(T) =>
97	                      /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)
98	                      /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cap T)
99	                      /\ Cardinality(S \cup T) =
100	                              Cardinality(S) + Cardinality(T)
101	                              - Cardinality(S \cap T)  
102	  PROOF OMITTED
103	
104	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
105	
106	THEOREM PigeonHole ==
107	            \A S, T : /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
108	                      /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
109	                      /\ Cardinality(T) < Cardinality(S)
110	                      => \A f \in [S -> T] :
111	                           \E x, y \in S : x # y /\ f[x] = f[y]
112	  PROOF OMITTED
113	
114	-------------------------------------------------------
115	
116	THEOREM \A S, T , f :  /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
117	                       /\ f \in [S -> T]
118	                       /\ \A y \in T : \E x \in S : y = f[x]
119	                       => /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
120	                          /\ Cardinality(T) \leq Cardinality(S)
121	PROOF OMITTED
122	
123	THEOREM ProductFinite ==
124	     \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ IsFiniteSet(T) => IsFiniteSet(S \X T)
125	PROOF OMITTED
126	
127	THEOREM SubsetsFinite == \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet(SUBSET S)
128	PROOF OMITTED
129	=============================================================================
130

file.content:
-------------------------------- MODULE Sets --------------------------------
EXTENDS Integers, NaturalsInduction, TLAPS

IsBijection(f, S, T) == /\ f \in [S -> T]
                        /\ \A x, y \in S : (x # y) => (f[x] # f[y])
                        /\ \A y \in T : \E x \in S : f[x] = y

IsFiniteSet(S) == \E n \in Nat : \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)

CONSTANT Cardinality(_)
AXIOM CardinalityAxiom ==
         \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) =>
           \A n : (n = Cardinality(S)) <=>
                    (n \in Nat) /\ \E f : IsBijection(f, 1..n, S)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityInNat == \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => Cardinality(S) \in Nat
  PROOF OMITTED

------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityZero ==
           /\ IsFiniteSet({})
           /\ Cardinality({}) = 0
           /\ \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (Cardinality(S)=0) => (S = {})
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM CardinalityPlusOne ==
    ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
           NEW x, x \notin S
    PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cup {x})
           /\ Cardinality(S \cup {x}) = Cardinality(S) + 1
  PROOF OMITTED

------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityOne == \A m : /\ IsFiniteSet({m})
                                 /\ Cardinality({m}) = 1
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM CardinalityTwo == \A m, p : m # p => 
                              /\ IsFiniteSet({m,p})
                              /\ Cardinality({m,p}) = 2
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM IntervalCardinality ==  
  ASSUME NEW a \in Nat, NEW b \in Nat 
  PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(a..b)
         /\ Cardinality(a..b) = IF a > b THEN 0 ELSE b-a+1
  PROOF OMITTED

------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityOneConverse ==
   ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S), Cardinality(S) = 1
   PROVE  \E m : S = {m}
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM IsBijectionInverse ==
  ASSUME NEW f, NEW S, NEW T, 
         IsBijection(f, S, T) 
  PROVE  \E g : IsBijection(g, T, S)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM IsBijectionTransitive ==
  ASSUME NEW f1, NEW f2, NEW S, NEW T, NEW U, 
           IsBijection(f1, S, U),
           IsBijection(f2, U, T) 
  PROVE  \E g : IsBijection(g, S, T)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM IsBijectionCardinality ==
  \A f, S, T : /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
               /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
               => (IsBijection(f, S, T) <=> Cardinality(S) = Cardinality(T))
  PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA CardinalitySetMinus ==
      ASSUME NEW S, IsFiniteSet(S),
             NEW x \in S
      PROVE /\ IsFiniteSet(S \ {x})
            /\ Cardinality(S \ {x}) = Cardinality(S) - 1
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM FiniteSubset ==
  ASSUME NEW S, NEW TT, IsFiniteSet(TT), S \subseteq TT
  PROVE  /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
         /\ Cardinality(S) \leq Cardinality(TT)
  PROOF OMITTED

-------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM CardinalityUnion ==
          \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ IsFiniteSet(T) =>
                      /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cup T)
                      /\ IsFiniteSet(S \cap T)
                      /\ Cardinality(S \cup T) =
                              Cardinality(S) + Cardinality(T)
                              - Cardinality(S \cap T)  
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM PigeonHole ==
            \A S, T : /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
                      /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
                      /\ Cardinality(T) < Cardinality(S)
                      => \A f \in [S -> T] :
                           \E x, y \in S : x # y /\ f[x] = f[y]
  PROOF OMITTED

-------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM \A S, T , f :  /\ IsFiniteSet(S)
                       /\ f \in [S -> T]
                       /\ \A y \in T : \E x \in S : y = f[x]
                       => /\ IsFiniteSet(T)
                          /\ Cardinality(T) \leq Cardinality(S)
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM ProductFinite ==
     \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(S) /\ IsFiniteSet(T) => IsFiniteSet(S \X T)
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SubsetsFinite == \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => IsFiniteSet(SUBSET S)
PROOF OMITTED
=============================================================================

content.content:
1	-------------------------------- MODULE PaxosTuple --------------------------
2	EXTENDS Integers, Sets
3	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4	CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum
5	
6	ASSUME QuorumAssumption == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
7	                           /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}
8	Ballot ==  Nat
9	None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Ballot
10	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
11	Message ==
12	       {"1a"} \X Ballot
13	  \cup {"1b"} \X Acceptor \X Ballot \X (Ballot \cup {-1}) \X (Value \cup {None})
14	  \cup {"2a"} \X Ballot \X Value
15	  \cup {"2b"} \X Acceptor \X Ballot \X Value
16	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
17	VARIABLE maxBal,
18	         maxVBal, 
19	         maxVal,  
20	         msgs
21	
22	Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
23	
24	vars == <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal, msgs>>
25	
26	TypeOK == /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
27	          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
28	          /\ maxVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
29	          /\ msgs \subseteq Message
30	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
31	Init == /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
32	        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
33	        /\ maxVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
34	        /\ msgs = {}
35	
36	Phase1a(b) == /\ Send(<<"1a", b>>)
37	              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>
38	
39	Phase1b(a) == /\ \E m \in msgs :
40	                  /\ m[1] = "1a"
41	                  /\ m[2] > maxBal[a]
42	                  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m[2]]
43	                  /\ Send(<<"1b", a, m[2], maxVBal[a], maxVal[a]>>)
44	              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>
45	
46	Phase2a(b, v) ==
47	  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : m[1] = "2a" /\ m[3] = b
48	  /\ \E Q \in Quorum :
49	        LET Q1b == {m \in msgs : /\ m[1] = "1b"
50	                                 /\ m[2] \in Q
51	                                 /\ m[3] = b}
52	            Q1bv == {m \in Q1b : m[4] \geq 0}
53	        IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m[2] = a
54	            /\ \/ Q1bv = {}
55	               \/ \E m \in Q1bv :
56	                    /\ m[5] = v
57	                    /\ \A mm \in Q1bv : m[4] \geq mm[4]
58	  /\ Send(<<"2a", b, v>>)
59	  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>
60	
61	Phase2b(a) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m[1] = "2a"
62	                              /\ m[2] \geq maxBal[a]
63	                              /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m[2]]
64	                              /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m[2]]
65	                              /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m[3]]
66	                              /\ Send(<<"2b", a, m[2], m[3]>>)
67	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
68	Next == \/ \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1a(b)
69	                             \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(b, v)
70	        \/ \E a \in Acceptor : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)
71	
72	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
73	----------------------------------------------------------------------------
74	votes == [a \in Acceptor |->
75	           {<<m[3], m[4]>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm[1] = "2b"
76	                                                 /\ mm[2] = a }}]
77	V == INSTANCE Voting
78	
79	THEOREM Spec => V!Spec
80	  PROOF OMITTED
81	
82	============================================================================
83

file.content:
-------------------------------- MODULE PaxosTuple --------------------------
EXTENDS Integers, Sets
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
                           /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}
Ballot ==  Nat
None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Ballot
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Message ==
       {"1a"} \X Ballot
  \cup {"1b"} \X Acceptor \X Ballot \X (Ballot \cup {-1}) \X (Value \cup {None})
  \cup {"2a"} \X Ballot \X Value
  \cup {"2b"} \X Acceptor \X Ballot \X Value
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLE maxBal,
         maxVBal, 
         maxVal,  
         msgs

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}

vars == <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal, msgs>>

TypeOK == /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          /\ maxVal \in [Acceptor -> Value \cup {None}]
          /\ msgs \subseteq Message
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal = [a \in Acceptor |-> None]
        /\ msgs = {}

Phase1a(b) == /\ Send(<<"1a", b>>)
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) == /\ \E m \in msgs :
                  /\ m[1] = "1a"
                  /\ m[2] > maxBal[a]
                  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m[2]]
                  /\ Send(<<"1b", a, m[2], maxVBal[a], maxVal[a]>>)
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b, v) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : m[1] = "2a" /\ m[3] = b
  /\ \E Q \in Quorum :
        LET Q1b == {m \in msgs : /\ m[1] = "1b"
                                 /\ m[2] \in Q
                                 /\ m[3] = b}
            Q1bv == {m \in Q1b : m[4] \geq 0}
        IN  /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in Q1b : m[2] = a
            /\ \/ Q1bv = {}
               \/ \E m \in Q1bv :
                    /\ m[5] = v
                    /\ \A mm \in Q1bv : m[4] \geq mm[4]
  /\ Send(<<"2a", b, v>>)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m[1] = "2a"
                              /\ m[2] \geq maxBal[a]
                              /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m[2]]
                              /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m[2]]
                              /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m[3]]
                              /\ Send(<<"2b", a, m[2], m[3]>>)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballot : \/ Phase1a(b)
                             \/ \E v \in Value : Phase2a(b, v)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptor : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
votes == [a \in Acceptor |->
           {<<m[3], m[4]>> : m \in {mm \in msgs: /\ mm[1] = "2b"
                                                 /\ mm[2] = a }}]
V == INSTANCE Voting

THEOREM Spec => V!Spec
  PROOF OMITTED

============================================================================

input.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Consistent -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA QuorumIntersect ==
  ASSUME NEW Q1 \in Quorum, NEW Q2 \in Quorum
  PROVE \E a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : a \in Acceptor
  BY QuorumAssumption

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>2. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b, v)
    BY DEF Init, VotedFor
  <1>3. VotesSafe
    BY <1>2 DEF VotesSafe
  <1>4. OneValuePerBallot
    BY <1>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The key technical lemma: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under invariants
LEMMA ShowsSafetyLemma ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
  <1>0. /\ TypeOK
        /\ VotesSafe
        /\ OneValuePerBallot
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
    BY DEF Inv, ShowsSafeAt
  <1>1. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>2. PICK c0 \in -1..(b-1) :
          /\ (c0 # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v)
          /\ \A d \in (c0+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. d \in Nat /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1 /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>5. CASE d > c0
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>5, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE d = c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>6
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                   PROVE VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
        OBVIOUS
      <3>1. a \in Acceptor
        BY <1>1
      <3>2. CASE VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        BY <3>2
      <3>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        <4>1. \A w \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, c0, w)
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, c0, w)
                       PROVE FALSE
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. c0 \in Ballot
            BY <1>6, <1>4, c0 \in -1..(b-1) DEF Ballot
          <5>2. v = w
            BY <5>1, <2>1, <2>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <3>3
        <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
        <4>3. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
          <5>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1, <1>0 DEF Ballot
        <4>4. maxBal[a] > c0
          BY <4>3, <1>4, <1>6, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
        <4>5. CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>2, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4> QED BY <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3
    <2>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>7. CASE d < c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>7
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. c0 \in Ballot
      BY <1>7, c0 \in -1..(b-1), <1>4 DEF Ballot
    <2>4. SafeAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
    <2>5. d \in 0..(c0-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>7
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <2>5 DEF SafeAt
  <1>8. CASE c0 = -1
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>8
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1> QED
    BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>6, <1>7, <1>8, c0 \in -1..(b-1)

=============================================================================

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==

                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. d \in Nat /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1 /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>5. CASE d > c0

      BY <1>4, <1>5, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE d = c0 /\ c0 # -1

    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor

    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)

      BY <1>2, <2>1

      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4

         [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>,

  <1>0. TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)'
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>2. d \in Nat /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
          \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>4. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>5. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
    <2>1. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) = VotedFor(a, d, v)'
      BY <1>5 DEF VotedFor
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] = maxBal[a]'
      BY <1>5
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) = DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>5 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d) = CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>3, <2>1, <2>4
    <2> QED BY <2>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE Next
    <2>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      BY <1>6 DEF Next
    <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
      <3>1. votes' = votes
        BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
      <3>2. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![aa] = bb]
          BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb /\ bb > maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>1, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
        <4>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
          BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
        <4>4. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
          BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>5. bb \in Nat /\ bb >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>4, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, Ballot
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <4>5
      <3>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q

          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)

          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)

          <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>1, <3>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]

          <5>4. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ d \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>5. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>4
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)

      <3>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb

      <3>6. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes[a]' = votes[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>7. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal[aa] \in Int /\ bb \in Int

        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <3>2, <3>4, <4>1
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <3>3
      <3>8. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :

        <4>2. CASE a # aa

        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2

        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)

          <5>2. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ d \in Int /\ b \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}

          <5>4. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>2
          <5>5. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, d, w)'

              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6>1. CASE a = aa

              <7>2. <<d, w>> \in votes[a]'

              <7>3. <<d, w>> \in votes[a] \/ <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>

              <7>5. <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>

              <7>8. maxBal[a] <= bb

              <7>10. maxBal[a] > bb

                BY DEF Ballot
              <7> QED BY <7>8, <7>10, <5>2, <7>11
            <6>2. CASE a # aa

              <7> QED BY <7>2, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>4, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>9 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>5, <1>6

------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Consistent -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA QuorumIntersect ==
  ASSUME NEW Q1 \in Quorum, NEW Q2 \in Quorum
  PROVE \E a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : a \in Acceptor
  BY QuorumAssumption

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>2. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b, v)
    BY DEF Init, VotedFor
  <1>3. VotesSafe
    BY <1>2 DEF VotesSafe
  <1>4. OneValuePerBallot
    BY <1>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The key technical lemma: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under invariants
LEMMA ShowsSafetyLemma ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
  <1>0. /\ TypeOK
        /\ VotesSafe
        /\ OneValuePerBallot
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
    BY DEF Inv, ShowsSafeAt
  <1>1. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>2. PICK c0 \in -1..(b-1) :
          /\ (c0 # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v)
          /\ \A d \in (c0+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. d \in Nat /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1 /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>5. CASE d > c0
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>5, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE d = c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>6
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                   PROVE VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
        OBVIOUS
      <3>1. a \in Acceptor
        BY <1>1
      <3>2. CASE VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        BY <3>2
      <3>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        <4>1. \A w \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, c0, w)
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, c0, w)
                       PROVE FALSE
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. c0 \in Ballot
            BY <1>6, <1>4, c0 \in -1..(b-1) DEF Ballot
          <5>2. v = w
            BY <5>1, <2>1, <2>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <3>3
        <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
        <4>3. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
          <5>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1, <1>0 DEF Ballot
        <4>4. maxBal[a] > c0
          BY <4>3, <1>4, <1>6, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
        <4>5. CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>2, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4> QED BY <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3
    <2>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>7. CASE d < c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>7
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. c0 \in Ballot
      BY <1>7, c0 \in -1..(b-1), <1>4 DEF Ballot
    <2>4. SafeAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
    <2>5. d \in 0..(c0-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>7
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <2>5 DEF SafeAt
  <1>8. CASE c0 = -1
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>8
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1> QED
    BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>6, <1>7, <1>8, c0 \in -1..(b-1)

=============================================================================

lines: +\* SafeAt is preserved by Next actions
+         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
+  <1>2. d \in Nat /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
+          \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)
+    <2>1. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) = VotedFor(a, d, v)'
+    <2>3. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) = DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
+    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d) = CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
+    <2>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
+        <4>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
+      <3>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
+                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
+          <5>4. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ d \in Int
+    <2>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
+      <3>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
+      <3>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
+      <3>6. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes[a]' = votes[a]
+      <3>8. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
+              VotedFor(a, b1, w) => VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
+        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
+      <3>9. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
+                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
+          <5>2. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ d \in Int /\ b \in Int
+            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, d, w)'

        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>6. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes[a]' = votes[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>7. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal[aa] \in Int /\ bb \in Int
          BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK, Ballot
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <3>2, <3>4, <4>1
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <3>3
      <3>8. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
              VotedFor(a, b1, w) => VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,

        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)

          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ d \in Int /\ b \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            <6>1. maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <3>7, <4>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>4. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>2

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Consistent -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA QuorumIntersect ==
  ASSUME NEW Q1 \in Quorum, NEW Q2 \in Quorum
  PROVE \E a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : a \in Acceptor
  BY QuorumAssumption

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>2. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b, v)
    BY DEF Init, VotedFor
  <1>3. VotesSafe
    BY <1>2 DEF VotesSafe
  <1>4. OneValuePerBallot
    BY <1>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The key technical lemma: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under invariants
LEMMA ShowsSafetyLemma ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
  <1>0. /\ TypeOK
        /\ VotesSafe
        /\ OneValuePerBallot
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
    BY DEF Inv, ShowsSafeAt
  <1>1. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>2. PICK c0 \in -1..(b-1) :
          /\ (c0 # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v)
          /\ \A d \in (c0+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. d \in Nat /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1 /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>5. CASE d > c0
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>5, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE d = c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>6
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                   PROVE VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
        OBVIOUS
      <3>1. a \in Acceptor
        BY <1>1
      <3>2. CASE VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        BY <3>2
      <3>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        <4>1. \A w \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, c0, w)
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, c0, w)
                       PROVE FALSE
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. c0 \in Ballot
            BY <1>6, <1>4, c0 \in -1..(b-1) DEF Ballot
          <5>2. v = w
            BY <5>1, <2>1, <2>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <3>3
        <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
        <4>3. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
          <5>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1, <1>0 DEF Ballot
        <4>4. maxBal[a] > c0
          BY <4>3, <1>4, <1>6, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
        <4>5. CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>2, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4> QED BY <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3
    <2>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>7. CASE d < c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>7
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. c0 \in Ballot
      BY <1>7, c0 \in -1..(b-1), <1>4 DEF Ballot
    <2>4. SafeAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
    <2>5. d \in 0..(c0-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>7
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <2>5 DEF SafeAt
  <1>8. CASE c0 = -1
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>8
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1> QED
    BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>6, <1>7, <1>8, c0 \in -1..(b-1)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt is preserved by Next actions
LEMMA SafeAtStable ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>,
         TypeOK',
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
  <1>0. TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)'
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>2. d \in Nat /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
          \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>4. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>5. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
    <2>1. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) = VotedFor(a, d, v)'
      BY <1>5 DEF VotedFor
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] = maxBal[a]'
      BY <1>5
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) = DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>5 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d) = CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>3, <2>1, <2>4
    <2> QED BY <2>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE Next
    <2>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      BY <1>6 DEF Next
    <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
      <3>1. votes' = votes
        BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
      <3>2. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![aa] = bb]
          BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb /\ bb > maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>1, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
        <4>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
          BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
        <4>4. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
          BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>5. bb \in Nat /\ bb >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>4, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, Ballot
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <4>5
      <3>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)
          <5>1. VotedFor(a, d, v)'
            BY <4>2, <3>1 DEF VotedFor
          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>1, <3>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            BY <3>2, <4>1
          <5>4. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ d \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>5. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>4
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      <3>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        BY <2>3
      <3>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>4. maxBal[aa] <= bb
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
      <3>5. votes[aa]' = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>6. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes[a]' = votes[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>7. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal[aa] \in Int /\ bb \in Int
          BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK, Ballot
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <3>2, <3>4, <4>1
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <3>3
      <3>8. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
              VotedFor(a, b1, w) => VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                            VotedFor(a, b1, w)
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. CASE a = aa
          BY <4>1, <3>5 DEF VotedFor
        <4>2. CASE a # aa
          BY <4>2, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3>9. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)
          <5>1. VotedFor(a, d, v)'
            BY <4>2, <3>8, <4>1, <1>2
          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ d \in Int /\ b \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            <6>1. maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <3>7, <4>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>4. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>2
          <5>5. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, d, w)'
                         PROVE FALSE
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6>1. CASE a = aa
              <7>1. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
                BY <6>1, <3>5
              <7>2. <<d, w>> \in votes[a]'
                BY DEF VotedFor
              <7>3. <<d, w>> \in votes[a] \/ <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
                BY <7>1, <7>2
              <7>4. <<d, w>> \notin votes[a]
                BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
              <7>5. <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
                BY <7>3, <7>4
              <7>6. d = bb
                BY <7>5
              <7>7. maxBal[aa] <= bb
                BY <3>4
              <7>8. maxBal[a] <= bb
                BY <6>1, <7>7
              <7>9. maxBal[a] > d /\ d = bb
                BY <5>1, <7>6
              <7>10. maxBal[a] > bb
                BY <7>9
              <7>11. bb \in Int
                BY DEF Ballot
              <7> QED BY <7>8, <7>10, <5>2, <7>11
            <6>2. CASE a # aa
              <7>1. votes[a]' = votes[a]
                BY <6>2, <3>6, <4>1
              <7>2. VotedFor(a, d, w)
                BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
              <7> QED BY <7>2, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>4, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>9 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>5, <1>6

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Consistent -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA QuorumIntersect ==
  ASSUME NEW Q1 \in Quorum, NEW Q2 \in Quorum
  PROVE \E a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : a \in Acceptor
  BY QuorumAssumption

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>2. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b, v)
    BY DEF Init, VotedFor
  <1>3. VotesSafe
    BY <1>2 DEF VotesSafe
  <1>4. OneValuePerBallot
    BY <1>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The key technical lemma: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under invariants
LEMMA ShowsSafetyLemma ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
  <1>0. /\ TypeOK
        /\ VotesSafe
        /\ OneValuePerBallot
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
    BY DEF Inv, ShowsSafeAt
  <1>1. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>2. PICK c0 \in -1..(b-1) :
          /\ (c0 # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v)
          /\ \A d \in (c0+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. d \in Nat /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1 /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>5. CASE d > c0
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>5, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE d = c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>6
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                   PROVE VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
        OBVIOUS
      <3>1. a \in Acceptor
        BY <1>1
      <3>2. CASE VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        BY <3>2
      <3>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        <4>1. \A w \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, c0, w)
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, c0, w)
                       PROVE FALSE
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. c0 \in Ballot
            BY <1>6, <1>4, c0 \in -1..(b-1) DEF Ballot
          <5>2. v = w
            BY <5>1, <2>1, <2>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <3>3
        <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
        <4>3. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
          <5>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1, <1>0 DEF Ballot
        <4>4. maxBal[a] > c0
          BY <4>3, <1>4, <1>6, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
        <4>5. CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>2, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4> QED BY <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3
    <2>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>7. CASE d < c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>7
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. c0 \in Ballot
      BY <1>7, c0 \in -1..(b-1), <1>4 DEF Ballot
    <2>4. SafeAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
    <2>5. d \in 0..(c0-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>7
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <2>5 DEF SafeAt
  <1>8. CASE c0 = -1
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>8
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1> QED
    BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>6, <1>7, <1>8, c0 \in -1..(b-1)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt is preserved by Next actions
LEMMA SafeAtStable ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>,
         TypeOK',
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
  <1>0. TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)'
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>2. d \in Nat /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
          \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>4. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>5. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
    <2>1. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) = VotedFor(a, d, v)'
      BY <1>5 DEF VotedFor
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] = maxBal[a]'
      BY <1>5
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) = DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>5 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d) = CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>3, <2>1, <2>4
    <2> QED BY <2>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE Next
    <2>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      BY <1>6 DEF Next
    <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
      <3>1. votes' = votes
        BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
      <3>2. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![aa] = bb]
          BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb /\ bb > maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>1, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
        <4>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
          BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
        <4>4. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
          BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>5. bb \in Nat /\ bb >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>4, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, Ballot
        <4>6. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int
          <5>1. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1 DEF Ballot
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <4>5, <4>6
      <3>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)
          <5>1. VotedFor(a, d, v)'
            BY <4>2, <3>1 DEF VotedFor
          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>1, <3>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            BY <3>2, <4>1
          <5>4. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ d \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>5. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>4
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      <3>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        BY <2>3
      <3>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>4. maxBal[aa] <= bb
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
      <3>5. votes[aa]' = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>6. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes[a]' = votes[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>7. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal[aa] \in Int /\ bb \in Int
          BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK, Ballot
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <3>2, <3>4, <4>1
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <3>3
      <3>8. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
              VotedFor(a, b1, w) => VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                            VotedFor(a, b1, w)
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. CASE a = aa
          BY <4>1, <3>5 DEF VotedFor
        <4>2. CASE a # aa
          BY <4>2, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3>9. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)
          <5>1. VotedFor(a, d, v)'
            BY <4>2, <3>8, <4>1, <1>2
          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ d \in Int /\ b \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            <6>1. maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <3>7, <4>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>4. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>2
          <5>5. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, d, w)'
                         PROVE FALSE
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6>1. CASE a = aa
              <7>1. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
                BY <6>1, <3>5
              <7>2. <<d, w>> \in votes[a]'
                BY DEF VotedFor
              <7>3. <<d, w>> \in votes[a] \/ <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
                BY <7>1, <7>2
              <7>4. <<d, w>> \notin votes[a]
                BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
              <7>5. <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
                BY <7>3, <7>4
              <7>6. d = bb
                BY <7>5
              <7>7. maxBal[aa] <= bb
                BY <3>4
              <7>8. maxBal[a] <= bb
                BY <6>1, <7>7
              <7>9. maxBal[a] > d /\ d = bb
                BY <5>1, <7>6
              <7>10. maxBal[a] > bb
                BY <7>9
              <7>11. bb \in Int
                BY DEF Ballot
              <7> QED BY <7>8, <7>10, <5>2, <7>11
            <6>2. CASE a # aa
              <7>1. votes[a]' = votes[a]
                BY <6>2, <3>6, <4>1
              <7>2. VotedFor(a, d, w)
                BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
              <7> QED BY <7>2, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>4, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>9 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>5, <1>6

=============================================================================
