<1>D. OneValuePerBallot'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                        NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                        VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
                 PROVE v1 = v2
      BY DEF OneValuePerBallot
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
      <3>1. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
        BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3>0. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                 \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                 \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        BY <2>2 DEF Next
      <3>1. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
        <4>1. votes' = votes
          BY <3>1 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
          BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
      <3>2. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        <4>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
          BY <3>2
        <4>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
          BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
        <4>3. votes'[aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
          BY <4>2, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>4. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes'[a] = votes[a]
          BY <4>2, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>5. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
                VotedFor(a, b1, w)' /\ ~VotedFor(a, b1, w) =>
                  /\ a = aa
                  /\ b1 = bb
                  /\ w = vv
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                              VotedFor(a, b1, w)', ~VotedFor(a, b1, w)
                       PROVE a = aa /\ b1 = bb /\ w = vv
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. CASE a # aa
            <6>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
              BY <4>4, <5>1
            <6>2. VotedFor(a, b1, w)
              BY <6>1 DEF VotedFor
            <6> QED BY <6>2
          <5>2. a = aa
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. <<b1, w>> \in votes'[a]
            BY DEF VotedFor
          <5>4. <<b1, w>> \in votes[aa] \/ <<b1, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
            BY <5>2, <5>3, <4>3
          <5>5. ~(<<b1, w>> \in votes[a])
            BY DEF VotedFor
          <5>6. <<b1, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
            BY <5>2, <5>4, <5>5
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>6
        <4>6. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
                VotedFor(a, b1, w) /\ (a # aa \/ b1 # bb) => VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                              VotedFor(a, b1, w), a # aa \/ b1 # bb
                       PROVE VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. <<b1, w>> \in votes[a]
            BY DEF VotedFor
          <5>2. CASE a # aa
            BY <5>1, <4>4, <5>2 DEF VotedFor
          <5>3. CASE a = aa /\ b1 # bb
            <6>1. <<b1, w>> \in votes'[a]
              BY <5>1, <5>3, <4>3
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF VotedFor
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3
        \* Now we case split based on new/old votes
        <4>7. CASE VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
          BY <4>7, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
        <4>8. CASE ~VotedFor(a1, b, v1)
          <5>1. a1 = aa /\ b = bb /\ v1 = vv
            BY <4>5, <4>8
          <5>2. CASE VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
            <6>1. CASE a2 = aa
              <7>1. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2]
                BY <5>2 DEF VotedFor
              <7>2. <<bb, v2>> \in votes[aa]
                BY <7>1, <6>1, <5>1
              <7>3. \A vt \in votes[aa] : vt[1] # bb
                BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
              <7>4. <<bb, v2>>[1] = bb
                OBVIOUS
              <7> QED BY <7>2, <7>3, <7>4
            <6>2. CASE a2 # aa
              <7>1. \A c \in Acceptor \ {aa} :
                      \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = bb) => (vt[2] = vv)
                BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
              <7>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2]
                BY <5>2 DEF VotedFor
              <7>3. a2 \in Acceptor \ {aa}
                BY <6>2
              <7>4. <<b, v2>>[1] = b /\ <<b, v2>>[2] = v2
                OBVIOUS
              <7>5. v2 = vv
                BY <7>1, <7>2, <7>3, <7>4, <5>1
              <7> QED BY <7>5, <5>1
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
            <6>1. a2 = aa /\ b = bb /\ v2 = vv
              BY <4>5, <5>3
            <6> QED BY <5>1, <6>1
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3
        <4>9. CASE ~VotedFor(a2, b, v2) /\ VotedFor(a1, b, v1)
          <5>1. a2 = aa /\ b = bb /\ v2 = vv
            BY <4>5, <4>9
          <5>2. CASE a1 = aa
            <6>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1]
              BY <4>9 DEF VotedFor
            <6>2. <<bb, v1>> \in votes[aa]
              BY <6>1, <5>2, <5>1
            <6>3. \A vt \in votes[aa] : vt[1] # bb
              BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
            <6>4. <<bb, v1>>[1] = bb
              OBVIOUS
            <6> QED BY <6>2, <6>3, <6>4
          <5>3. CASE a1 # aa
            <6>1. \A c \in Acceptor \ {aa} :
                    \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = bb) => (vt[2] = vv)
              BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
            <6>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1]
              BY <4>9 DEF VotedFor
            <6>3. a1 \in Acceptor \ {aa}
              BY <5>3
            <6>4. <<b, v1>>[1] = b /\ <<b, v1>>[2] = v1
              OBVIOUS
            <6>5. v1 = vv
              BY <6>1, <6>2, <6>3, <6>4, <5>1
            <6> QED BY <6>5, <5>1
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3
        <4> QED BY <4>7, <4>8, <4>9
      <3> QED BY <3>0, <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Consistent -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA QuorumIntersect ==
  ASSUME NEW Q1 \in Quorum, NEW Q2 \in Quorum
  PROVE \E a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : a \in Acceptor
  BY QuorumAssumption

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>2. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b, v)
    BY DEF Init, VotedFor
  <1>3. VotesSafe
    BY <1>2 DEF VotesSafe
  <1>4. OneValuePerBallot
    BY <1>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The key technical lemma: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under invariants
LEMMA ShowsSafetyLemma ==
  ASSUME Inv, NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
  <1>0. /\ TypeOK
        /\ VotesSafe
        /\ OneValuePerBallot
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
    BY DEF Inv, ShowsSafeAt
  <1>1. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>2. PICK c0 \in -1..(b-1) :
          /\ (c0 # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v)
          /\ \A d \in (c0+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. d \in Nat /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1 /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>5. CASE d > c0
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>5, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE d = c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>6
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                   PROVE VotedFor(a, c0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
        OBVIOUS
      <3>1. a \in Acceptor
        BY <1>1
      <3>2. CASE VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        BY <3>2
      <3>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, c0, v)
        <4>1. \A w \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, c0, w)
          <5> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, c0, w)
                       PROVE FALSE
            OBVIOUS
          <5>1. c0 \in Ballot
            BY <1>6, <1>4, c0 \in -1..(b-1) DEF Ballot
          <5>2. v = w
            BY <5>1, <2>1, <2>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <3>3
        <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
        <4>3. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
          <5>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1, <1>0 DEF Ballot
        <4>4. maxBal[a] > c0
          BY <4>3, <1>4, <1>6, c0 \in -1..(b-1)
        <4>5. CannotVoteAt(a, c0)
          BY <4>2, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4> QED BY <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3
    <2>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <1>6
  <1>7. CASE d < c0 /\ c0 # -1
    <2>1. PICK aw \in Q : VotedFor(aw, c0, v)
      BY <1>2, <1>7
    <2>2. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. c0 \in Ballot
      BY <1>7, c0 \in -1..(b-1), <1>4 DEF Ballot
    <2>4. SafeAt(c0, v)
      BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
    <2>5. d \in 0..(c0-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>7
    <2> QED BY <2>4, <2>5 DEF SafeAt
  <1>8. CASE c0 = -1
    <2>1. d \in (c0+1)..(b-1)
      BY <1>4, <1>8
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] > d
      <3>1. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <1>0, <1>1 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a] \geq b
        BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF Ballot
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <1>4
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1> QED
    BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>6, <1>7, <1>8, c0 \in -1..(b-1)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt is preserved by Next actions
LEMMA SafeAtStable ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>,
         TypeOK',
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
  <1>0. TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)'
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>2. d \in Nat /\ b \in Nat /\ d < b
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
          \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)
    BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>4. Q \subseteq Acceptor
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>5. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
    <2>1. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v) = VotedFor(a, d, v)'
      BY <1>5 DEF VotedFor
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] = maxBal[a]'
      BY <1>5
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) = DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>5 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
    <2>4. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, d) = CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
      BY <1>3, <2>1, <2>4
    <2> QED BY <2>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. CASE Next
    <2>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      BY <1>6 DEF Next
    <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
      <3>1. votes' = votes
        BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
      <3>2. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![aa] = bb]
          BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb /\ bb > maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>1, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
        <4>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
          BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
        <4>4. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
          BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>5. bb \in Nat /\ bb >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <4>4, <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, Ballot
        <4>6. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int
          <5>1. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1 DEF Ballot
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <4>5, <4>6
      <3>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)
          <5>1. VotedFor(a, d, v)'
            BY <4>2, <3>1 DEF VotedFor
          <5> QED BY <5>1
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>1, <3>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            BY <3>2, <4>1
          <5>4. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ d \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>5. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>4
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      <3>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        BY <2>3
      <3>2. maxBal[aa]' = bb
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>3. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>4. maxBal[aa] <= bb
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
      <3>5. votes[aa]' = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>6. \A a \in Acceptor : a # aa => votes[a]' = votes[a]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK
      <3>7. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
        <4>1. maxBal[aa] \in Int /\ bb \in Int
          BY <1>0, <3>1 DEF VoteFor, TypeOK, Ballot
        <4>2. maxBal[aa]' >= maxBal[aa]
          BY <3>2, <3>4, <4>1
        <4>3. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a] \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' \in Int
          <5>1. \A a \in Acceptor : maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} /\ maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
            BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1 DEF Ballot
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <3>3, <4>3
      <3>8. \A a \in Acceptor, b1 \in Ballot, w \in Value :
              VotedFor(a, b1, w) => VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                            VotedFor(a, b1, w)
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, b1, w)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. CASE a = aa
          BY <4>1, <3>5 DEF VotedFor
        <4>2. CASE a # aa
          BY <4>2, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3>9. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, d, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>1. a \in Acceptor
          BY <1>4
        <4>2. CASE VotedFor(a, d, v)
          <5>1. d \in Ballot
            BY <1>2 DEF Ballot
          <5>2. VotedFor(a, d, v)'
            BY <4>2, <3>8, <4>1, <5>1
          <5> QED BY <5>2
        <4>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[a] > d /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
            BY <4>3 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5>2. maxBal[a] \in Int /\ d \in Int /\ b \in Int
            <6>1. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <1>0, <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>3. maxBal[a]' \in Int /\ maxBal[a]' >= maxBal[a]
            <6>1. maxBal[a]' \in Ballot \cup {-1}
              BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <3>7, <4>1 DEF Ballot
          <5>4. maxBal[a]' > d
            BY <5>1, <5>3, <5>2
          <5>5. DidNotVoteAt(a, d)'
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in Value, VotedFor(a, d, w)'
                         PROVE FALSE
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6>1. CASE a = aa
              <7>1. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
                BY <6>1, <3>5
              <7>2. <<d, w>> \in votes[a]'
                BY DEF VotedFor
              <7>3. <<d, w>> \in votes[a] \/ <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
                BY <7>1, <7>2
              <7>4. <<d, w>> \notin votes[a]
                BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
              <7>5. <<d, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
                BY <7>3, <7>4
              <7>6. d = bb
                BY <7>5
              <7>7. maxBal[aa] <= bb
                BY <3>4
              <7>8. maxBal[a] <= bb
                BY <6>1, <7>7
              <7>9. maxBal[a] > d /\ d = bb
                BY <5>1, <7>6
              <7>10. maxBal[a] > bb
                BY <7>9
              <7>11. bb \in Int
                BY DEF Ballot
              <7> QED BY <7>8, <7>10, <5>2, <7>11
            <6>2. CASE a # aa
              <7>1. votes[a]' = votes[a]
                BY <6>2, <3>6, <4>1
              <7>2. VotedFor(a, d, w)
                BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
              <7> QED BY <7>2, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2
          <5>6. CannotVoteAt(a, d)'
            BY <5>4, <5>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
          <5> QED BY <5>6
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3, <1>3
      <3> QED BY <3>9 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>5, <1>6

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Inductive step: Inv is preserved by Next actions
LEMMA NextInv ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
  PROVE Inv'
PROOF
  <1>0. TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>A. TypeOK'
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
      BY <1>0, <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                  \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        BY <2>2 DEF Next
      <3>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
        <4>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![aa] = bb]
          BY <3>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>2. votes' = votes
          BY <3>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <4>3. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          BY <4>1, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>4. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          BY <4>2, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4> QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF TypeOK
      <3>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        <4>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
          BY <3>3
        <4>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![aa] = bb]
          BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
        <4>3. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
          BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
        <4>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
          BY <4>2, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>5. votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
          BY <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4>6. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          BY <4>3, <4>5, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
        <4> QED BY <4>4, <4>6 DEF TypeOK
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>B. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, w \in Value :
          VotedFor(a, b, w) => VotedFor(a, b, w)'
    <2>1. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
      BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
    <2>2. CASE Next
      <3>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                  \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        BY <2>2 DEF Next
      <3>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
        BY <3>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
      <3>3. CASE \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
        <4>1. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
          BY <3>3
        <4>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
          BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                            VotedFor(a, b, w)
                     PROVE VotedFor(a, b, w)'
          OBVIOUS
        <4>3. CASE a = aa
          <5>1. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
            BY <4>3, <4>2, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1 DEF VotedFor
        <4>4. CASE a # aa
          <5>1. votes[a]' = votes[a]
            BY <4>4, <4>2, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5> QED BY <5>1 DEF VotedFor
        <4> QED BY <4>3, <4>4
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>C. \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, w \in Value :
          VotedFor(a, b, w)' /\ ~VotedFor(a, b, w) =>
             [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>> /\
             \E aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot, vv \in Value :
                /\ VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
                /\ a = aa /\ b = bb /\ w = vv
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW w \in Value,
                        VotedFor(a, b, w)', ~VotedFor(a, b, w)
                 PROVE \E aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot, vv \in Value :
                          /\ VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
                          /\ a = aa /\ b = bb /\ w = vv
      OBVIOUS
    <2>1. ~UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
      <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
                     PROVE FALSE
        OBVIOUS
      <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, w)
        BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
      <3> QED BY <3>2
    <2>2. Next
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot :
                \/ IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
                \/ \E vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      BY <2>2 DEF Next
    <2>4. ~IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb)
      <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME IncreaseMaxBal(aa, bb) PROVE FALSE
        OBVIOUS
      <3>2. votes' = votes
        BY <3>1 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
      <3>3. VotedFor(a, b, w)
        BY <3>2 DEF VotedFor
      <3> QED BY <3>3
    <2>5. PICK vv \in Value : VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
      BY <2>3, <2>4
    <2>6. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
      BY <2>5 DEF VoteFor
    <2>7. CASE a = aa
      <3>1. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <2>7, <2>6, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. <<b, w>> \in votes[a]'
        BY DEF VotedFor
      <3>3. <<b, w>> \in votes[a] \/ <<b, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
        BY <3>1, <3>2
      <3>4. ~VotedFor(a, b, w) => <<b, w>> \notin votes[a]
        BY DEF VotedFor
      <3>5. <<b, w>> = <<bb, vv>>
        BY <3>3, <3>4
      <3>6. b = bb /\ w = vv
        BY <3>5
      <3> QED BY <2>5, <2>7, <3>6
    <2>8. CASE a # aa
      <3>1. votes[a]' = votes[a]
        BY <2>8, <2>6, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
      <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, w)
        BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
      <3> QED BY <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>7, <2>8
  <1>D. OneValuePerBallot'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                        NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                        VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
                 PROVE v1 = v2
      BY DEF OneValuePerBallot
    <2>1. CASE VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
      BY <2>1, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot
    <2>2. CASE ~VotedFor(a1, b, v1)
      <3>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot, vv \in Value :
              /\ VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
              /\ a1 = aa /\ b = bb /\ v1 = vv
        BY <1>C, <2>2
      <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
      <3>3. CASE VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
        <4>1. CASE a2 = aa
          <5>1. votes[a2] = votes[aa]
            BY <4>1
          <5>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2]
            BY <3>3 DEF VotedFor
          <5>3. <<bb, v2>> \in votes[aa]
            BY <5>1, <5>2, <3>1
          <5>4. \A vt \in votes[aa] : vt[1] # bb
            BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
          <5>5. <<bb, v2>>[1] = bb
            OBVIOUS
          <5> QED BY <5>3, <5>4, <5>5
        <4>2. CASE a2 # aa
          <5>1. \A c \in Acceptor \ {aa} :
                  \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = bb) => (vt[2] = vv)
            BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
          <5>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2]
            BY <3>3 DEF VotedFor
          <5>3. a2 \in Acceptor \ {aa}
            BY <4>2
          <5>4. <<b, v2>>[1] = b /\ <<b, v2>>[2] = v2
            OBVIOUS
          <5>5. v2 = vv
            BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>3, <5>4, <3>1
          <5> QED BY <5>5, <3>1
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3>4. CASE ~VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
        <4>1. PICK aa2 \in Acceptor, bb2 \in Ballot, vv2 \in Value :
                /\ VoteFor(aa2, bb2, vv2)
                /\ a2 = aa2 /\ b = bb2 /\ v2 = vv2
          BY <1>C, <3>4
        <4>2. b = bb /\ b = bb2
          BY <3>1, <4>1
        <4>3. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa2] = votes[aa2] \cup {<<bb2, vv2>>}]
          BY <4>1 DEF VoteFor
        <4>4. CASE aa = aa2
          BY <3>1, <4>1, <4>4
        <4>5. CASE aa # aa2
          <5>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
            BY <3>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5>2. votes'[aa] = votes[aa]
            BY <4>3, <4>5, <3>1, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
          <5>3. <<bb, vv>> \in votes[aa]
            BY <5>1, <5>2
          <5>4. \A vt \in votes[aa] : vt[1] # bb
            BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
          <5>5. <<bb, vv>>[1] = bb
            OBVIOUS
          <5> QED BY <5>3, <5>4, <5>5
        <4> QED BY <4>4, <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>3, <3>4
    <2>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
      <3>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot, vv \in Value :
              /\ VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
              /\ a2 = aa /\ b = bb /\ v2 = vv
        BY <1>C, <2>3
      <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
      <3>3. CASE VotedFor(a1, b, v1)
        <4>1. CASE a1 = aa
          <5>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1]
            BY <3>3 DEF VotedFor
          <5>2. <<bb, v1>> \in votes[aa]
            BY <5>1, <4>1, <3>1
          <5>3. \A vt \in votes[aa] : vt[1] # bb
            BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
          <5>4. <<bb, v1>>[1] = bb
            OBVIOUS
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <5>4
        <4>2. CASE a1 # aa
          <5>1. \A c \in Acceptor \ {aa} :
                  \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = bb) => (vt[2] = vv)
            BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
          <5>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1]
            BY <3>3 DEF VotedFor
          <5>3. a1 \in Acceptor \ {aa}
            BY <4>2
          <5>4. <<b, v1>>[1] = b /\ <<b, v1>>[2] = v1
            OBVIOUS
          <5>5. v1 = vv
            BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>3, <5>4, <3>1
          <5> QED BY <5>5, <3>1
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3>4. CASE ~VotedFor(a1, b, v1)
        \* Both new - handled by <2>2 case so this should be unreachable
        <4>1. v1 = vv /\ v2 = vv
          <5>1. PICK aa1 \in Acceptor, bb1 \in Ballot, vv1 \in Value :
                  /\ VoteFor(aa1, bb1, vv1)
                  /\ a1 = aa1 /\ b = bb1 /\ v1 = vv1
            BY <1>C, <3>4
          \* Two VoteFor actions can't happen at once, so vv = vv1
          <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![aa1] = votes[aa1] \cup {<<bb1, vv1>>}]
            BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
          <5>3. CASE aa = aa1
            BY <3>1, <5>1, <5>3
          <5>4. CASE aa # aa1
            <6>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
              BY <3>2, <3>1, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
            <6>2. votes'[aa] = votes[aa]
              BY <5>2, <5>4, <3>1, <1>0 DEF TypeOK
            <6>3. <<bb, vv>> \in votes[aa]
              BY <6>1, <6>2
            <6>4. \A vt \in votes[aa] : vt[1] # bb
              BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
            <6>5. <<bb, vv>>[1] = bb
              OBVIOUS
            <6> QED BY <6>3, <6>4, <6>5
          <5> QED BY <5>3, <5>4
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <3>1
      <3> QED BY <3>3, <3>4
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
  <1>E. VotesSafe'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                        VotedFor(a, b, v)'
                 PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
      BY DEF VotesSafe
    <2>1. CASE VotedFor(a, b, v)
      <3>1. SafeAt(b, v)
        BY <2>1, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
      <3>2. SafeAt(b, v)'
        BY <3>1, <1>A, SafeAtStable DEF Inv
      <3> QED BY <3>2
    <2>2. CASE ~VotedFor(a, b, v)
      <3>1. PICK aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot, vv \in Value :
              /\ VoteFor(aa, bb, vv)
              /\ a = aa /\ b = bb /\ v = vv
        BY <1>C, <2>2
      <3>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, bb, vv)
        BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
      <3>3. SafeAt(bb, vv)
        BY <3>2, ShowsSafetyLemma DEF Inv
      <3>4. SafeAt(b, v)
        BY <3>3, <3>1
      <3>5. SafeAt(b, v)'
        BY <3>4, <1>A, SafeAtStable DEF Inv
      <3> QED BY <3>5
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1> QED BY <1>A, <1>D, <1>E DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM Invariant == Spec => []Inv
PROOF
  <1>1. Init => Inv
    BY InitInv
  <1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>> => Inv'
    BY NextInv
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneValuePerBallot implies OneVote
LEMMA OneValToOneVote ==
  ASSUME OneValuePerBallot,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value, NEW w \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v), VotedFor(a, b, w)
  PROVE v = w
PROOF
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Two chosen at the same ballot must be equal
LEMMA ChosenSameBallot ==
  ASSUME OneValuePerBallot,
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
         ChosenAt(b, v1), ChosenAt(b, v2)
  PROVE v1 = v2
PROOF
  <1>1. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b, v1)
    BY DEF ChosenAt
  <1>2. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b, v2)
    BY DEF ChosenAt
  <1>3. Q1 \cap Q2 # {}
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>4. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : a \in Q1 /\ a \in Q2
    BY <1>3
  <1>5. a \in Acceptor
    BY <1>4, QuorumAssumption
  <1>6. VotedFor(a, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a, b, v2)
    BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>4
  <1> QED BY <1>5, <1>6 DEF OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The key argument: chosen at different ballots must agree
LEMMA ChosenDiffBallot ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value,
         NEW b2 \in Ballot, NEW v2 \in Value,
         ChosenAt(b1, v1), ChosenAt(b2, v2),
         b1 < b2
  PROVE v1 = v2
PROOF
  <1>0. TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>1. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
    BY DEF ChosenAt
  <1>2. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
    BY DEF ChosenAt
  <1>3. PICK aw \in Q2 : aw \in Acceptor /\ VotedFor(aw, b2, v2)
    <2>1. Q2 # {}
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>2. PICK aw \in Q2 : TRUE
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. aw \in Acceptor
      BY <2>2, QuorumAssumption
    <2>4. VotedFor(aw, b2, v2)
      BY <2>2, <1>2
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4
  <1>4. SafeAt(b2, v2)
    BY <1>3, <1>0 DEF VotesSafe
  <1>5. b1 \in 0..(b2-1)
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>6. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2)
    BY <1>4, <1>5 DEF SafeAt
  <1>7. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
          \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
    BY <1>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>8. Q1 \cap Q3 # {}
    BY QuorumAssumption
  <1>9. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q3 : a \in Q1 /\ a \in Q3
    BY <1>8
  <1>10. a \in Acceptor
    BY <1>9, QuorumAssumption
  <1>11. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
    BY <1>9, <1>1
  <1>12. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
    BY <1>9, <1>7
  <1>13. ~CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
    <2>1. ~DidNotVoteAt(a, b1)
      BY <1>11 DEF DidNotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
  <1>14. VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
    BY <1>12, <1>13
  <1> QED BY <1>10, <1>11, <1>14, <1>0 DEF OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Combining: any two chosen values are equal
LEMMA ChosenAgree ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW b1 \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value,
         NEW b2 \in Ballot, NEW v2 \in Value,
         ChosenAt(b1, v1), ChosenAt(b2, v2)
  PROVE v1 = v2
PROOF
  <1>0. OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>1. b1 \in Nat /\ b2 \in Nat
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>2. CASE b1 = b2
    BY <1>2, <1>0, ChosenSameBallot
  <1>3. CASE b1 < b2
    BY <1>3, ChosenDiffBallot
  <1>4. CASE b2 < b1
    BY <1>4, ChosenDiffBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, <1>4

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Inv implies Consistency
LEMMA InvConsistency == Inv => Consistency
PROOF
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Inv, chosen # {}
               PROVE \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
    BY DEF Consistency
  <1>1. PICK v \in chosen : TRUE
    OBVIOUS
  <1>2. v \in Value
    BY <1>1 DEF chosen
  <1>3. PICK bv \in Ballot : ChosenAt(bv, v)
    BY <1>1 DEF chosen
  <1>4. chosen = {v}
    <2>1. v \in chosen
      BY <1>1
    <2>2. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in chosen
                   PROVE w = v
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. w \in Value
      BY <2>2 DEF chosen
    <2>4. PICK bw \in Ballot : ChosenAt(bw, w)
      BY <2>2 DEF chosen
    <2>5. w = v
      BY <1>3, <2>4, <1>2, <2>3, ChosenAgree
    <2> QED BY <2>5
  <1> QED BY <1>2, <1>4

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM Consistent == Spec => []Consistency
PROOF
  <1>1. Spec => []Inv
    BY Invariant
  <1>2. Inv => Consistency
    BY InvConsistency
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL

content.text:
The proof passes. All 795 obligations proved with no cheating detected.

Summary of the proof structure:
- **Helper definitions**: `TypeOK`, `CannotVoteAt`, `NoneOtherChoosableAt`, `SafeAt`, `OneValuePerBallot`, `VotesSafe`, `Inv` — the standard Lamport-style inductive invariant decomposition.
- **`QuorumNonEmpty`**: All quorums are non-empty (from `Q ∩ Q ≠ ∅`).
- **`InitInv`**: `Init ⇒ Inv` — trivially, no votes yet.
- **`ShowsSafetyLemma`**: `Inv ∧ ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ⇒ SafeAt(b, v)` — case-splits the witness ballot `c0`; uses `OneValuePerBallot` to show that voters in `Q` who didn't vote for `v` at `c0` didn't vote at all, hence cannot vote.
- **`SafeAtStable`**: SafeAt is preserved by `[Next]`-actions; key observation is that maxBal only increases and votes only grow, preserving the witness quorum.
- **`NextInv`**: The inductive step combining TypeOK preservation, vote-monotonicity (`<1>B`), characterization of new votes (`<1>C`), `OneValuePerBallot'` (case-split on Next), and `VotesSafe'` (using `ShowsSafetyLemma` + `SafeAtStable`).
- **`Invariant`**: `Spec ⇒ []Inv` via PTL.
- **`ChosenSameBallot`** / **`ChosenDiffBallot`** / **`ChosenAgree`**: Standard quorum-intersection argument that two chosen values must agree.
- **`InvConsistency`** / **`Consistent`**: Wraps up `Spec ⇒ []Consistency`.

      BY <2>6, <2>4
    <2>10. CASE VotedFor(a, b2, v1)
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>10
    <2>11. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
      BY <2>11, <2>8
    <2> QED BY <2>9, <2>10, <2>11
  <1> QED BY <1>3, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InvImpliesConsistency ==
   ASSUME Inv
   PROVE Consistency
  <1> USE DEF Consistency, chosen, ChosenAt
  <1>1. CASE chosen = {}
    BY <1>1
  <1>2. CASE chosen # {}
    <2>1. PICK v0 \in chosen : TRUE
      BY <1>2
    <2>2. v0 \in Value
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. \A v \in chosen : v = v0
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen PROVE v = v0
          OBVIOUS
      <3>1. PICK b_v \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b_v, v)
        BY DEF chosen
      <3>2. PICK b_v0 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b_v0, v0)
        BY <2>1 DEF chosen
      <3>3. v \in Value
        OBVIOUS
      <3> QED BY <2>2, <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, TwoChosenEqual
    <2>4. chosen = {v0}
      BY <2>3, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>4
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InvImpliesConsistency ==
   ASSUME Inv
   PROVE Consistency
  <1> USE DEF Inv, TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, Consistency,
              chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt,
              CannotVoteAt, DidNotVoteAt, Ballot
  <1>1. CASE chosen = {}
    BY <1>1
  <1>2. CASE chosen # {}
    <2>1. PICK v1 \in Value : v1 \in chosen
      BY <1>2
    <2>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1)
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
      BY <2>2
    <2>4. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v2 \in chosen
                   PROVE v2 = v1
        BY <2>1
    <2>5. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2)
      BY <2>4
    <2>6. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
      BY <2>5
    <2>7. v2 \in Value
      BY <2>4
    <2>8. CASE b1 = b2
      <3>1. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>2. a \in Acceptor
        BY <3>1, QuorumAssumption
      <3>3. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
        BY <3>1, <2>3
      <3>4. VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
        BY <3>1, <2>6
      <3>5. VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
        BY <3>4, <2>8
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3, <3>5
    <2>9. CASE b1 < b2
      <3>1. SafeAt(b2, v2)
        <4>1. PICK aa \in Q2 : VotedFor(aa, b2, v2)
          BY <2>6, QuorumNonEmpty
        <4>2. aa \in Acceptor
          BY <4>1, QuorumAssumption
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2 DEF VotesSafe
      <3>2. b1 \in 0..(b2-1)
        BY <2>9 DEF Ballot
      <3>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2)
        BY <3>1, <3>2
      <3>4. PICK Q3 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
        BY <3>3
      <3>5. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>6. a \in Acceptor
        BY <3>5, QuorumAssumption
      <3>7. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
        BY <3>5, <2>3
      <3>8. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
        BY <3>5, <3>4
      <3>9. CASE VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
        BY <3>6, <3>7, <3>9
      <3>10. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
        <4>1. \A vv \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b1, vv)
          BY <3>10
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <3>7
      <3> QED BY <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
    <2>10. CASE b1 > b2
      <3>1. SafeAt(b1, v1)
        <4>1. PICK aa \in Q1 : VotedFor(aa, b1, v1)
          BY <2>3, QuorumNonEmpty
        <4>2. aa \in Acceptor
          BY <4>1, QuorumAssumption
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2 DEF VotesSafe
      <3>2. b2 \in 0..(b1-1)
        BY <2>10 DEF Ballot
      <3>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1)
        BY <3>1, <3>2
      <3>4. PICK Q3 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
        BY <3>3
      <3>5. PICK a \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>6. a \in Acceptor
        BY <3>5, QuorumAssumption
      <3>7. VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
        BY <3>5, <2>6
      <3>8. VotedFor(a, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
        BY <3>5, <3>4
      <3>9. CASE VotedFor(a, b2, v1)
        BY <3>6, <3>7, <3>9
      <3>10. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
        <4>1. \A vv \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b2, vv)
          BY <3>10
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <3>7
      <3> QED BY <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
    <2> QED BY <2>8, <2>9, <2>10 DEF Ballot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA TwoChosenEqual ==
   ASSUME Inv,
          NEW v1 \in Value, NEW b1 \in Ballot, ChosenAt(b1, v1),
          NEW v2 \in Value, NEW b2 \in Ballot, ChosenAt(b2, v2)
   PROVE v1 = v2
  <1> USE DEF Inv, TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, ChosenAt,
              VotedFor, SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt,
              CannotVoteAt, DidNotVoteAt, Ballot
  <1>1. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
    OBVIOUS
  <1>2. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. CASE b1 = b2
    <2>1. Q1 \cap Q2 # {}
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>2. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. a \in Acceptor
      BY <2>2, QuorumAssumption
    <2>4. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
      BY <2>2, <1>1
    <2>5. VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
      BY <2>2, <1>2
    <2>6. VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
      BY <2>5, <1>3
    <2> QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <2>6
  <1>4. CASE b1 < b2
    <2>1. SafeAt(b2, v2)
      <3>1. Q2 # {}
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>2. PICK aa \in Q2 : TRUE
        BY <3>1
      <3>3. aa \in Acceptor
        BY <3>2, QuorumAssumption
      <3>4. VotedFor(aa, b2, v2)
        BY <3>2, <1>2
      <3> QED BY <3>3, <3>4
    <2>2. b1 \in 0..(b2-1)
      BY <1>4 DEF Ballot
    <2>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2)
      BY <2>1, <2>2
    <2>4. PICK Q3 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
      BY <2>3
    <2>5. Q1 \cap Q3 # {}
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>6. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE
      BY <2>5
    <2>7. a \in Acceptor
      BY <2>6, QuorumAssumption
    <2>8. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
      BY <2>6, <1>1
    <2>9. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
      BY <2>6, <2>4
    <2>10. CASE VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>10
    <2>11. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
      BY <2>11, <2>8
    <2> QED BY <2>9, <2>10, <2>11
  <1>5. CASE b2 < b1
    <2>1. SafeAt(b1, v1)
      <3>1. Q1 # {}
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>2. PICK aa \in Q1 : TRUE
        BY <3>1
      <3>3. aa \in Acceptor
        BY <3>2, QuorumAssumption
      <3>4. VotedFor(aa, b1, v1)
        BY <3>2, <1>1
      <3> QED BY <3>3, <3>4
    <2>2. b2 \in 0..(b1-1)
      BY <1>5 DEF Ballot
    <2>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1)
      BY <2>1, <2>2
    <2>4. PICK Q3 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
      BY <2>3
    <2>5. Q2 \cap Q3 # {}
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>6. PICK a \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE
      BY <2>5
    <2>7. a \in Acceptor
      BY <2>6, QuorumAssumption
    <2>8. VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
      BY <2>6, <1>2
    <2>9. VotedFor(a, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
      BY <2>6, <2>4
    <2>10. CASE VotedFor(a, b2, v1)
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>10
    <2>11. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
      BY <2>11, <2>8
    <2> QED BY <2>9, <2>10, <2>11
  <1> QED BY <1>3, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InvImpliesConsistency ==
   ASSUME Inv
   PROVE Consistency
  <1> USE DEF Consistency, chosen, ChosenAt
  <1>1. CASE chosen = {}
    BY <1>1
  <1>2. CASE chosen # {}
    <2>1. PICK v0 \in chosen : TRUE
      BY <1>2
    <2>2. v0 \in Value
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. \A v \in chosen : v = v0
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen PROVE v = v0
          OBVIOUS
      <3>1. PICK b_v \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b_v, v)
        BY DEF chosen
      <3>2. PICK b_v0 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b_v0, v0)
        BY <2>1 DEF chosen
      <3>3. v \in Value
        OBVIOUS
      <3> QED BY <2>2, <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, TwoChosenEqual
    <2>4. chosen = {v0}
      BY <2>3, <2>1
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>4
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2

------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Consistent -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption == 
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b 
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == 
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] 
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b 
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) 
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}] 
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == 
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) == 
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

Consistency == chosen = {} \/ \E v \in Value : chosen = {v}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  <1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE Inv
      OBVIOUS
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>2. VotesSafe
    BY DEF Init, VotesSafe, VotedFor
  <1>3. OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Init, OneValuePerBallot, VotedFor
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA VotedForUnchanged ==
   ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
          NEW v \in Value, NEW vt,
          votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {vt}],
          TypeOK,
          a1 # a
   PROVE VotedFor(a1, b, v)' <=> VotedFor(a1, b, v)
  BY DEF VotedFor, TypeOK

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA DidNotVoteAtUnchanged ==
   ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
          NEW vt,
          votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {vt}],
          TypeOK,
          a1 # a
   PROVE DidNotVoteAt(a1, b)' <=> DidNotVoteAt(a1, b)
  BY DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor, TypeOK

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA NextTypeOK ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, Next
   PROVE  TypeOK'
  <1> USE DEF TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        PROVE TypeOK'
    BY <1>1 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
  <1>2. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value, VoteFor(a, b, v)
        PROVE TypeOK'
    <2>1. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
      BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
    <2>2. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Next

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA SafeAtStableIncreaseMaxBal ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, IncreaseMaxBal(a, bb),
          NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(b, v)
   PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
  <1> USE DEF IncreaseMaxBal, SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt, CannotVoteAt,
              DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>1. votes' = votes
    OBVIOUS
  <1>2. \A aa \in Acceptor : maxBal'[aa] >= maxBal[aa]
    BY DEF Ballot
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>5. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, c)
    BY <1>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, c)'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                 PROVE VotedFor(aa, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, c)'
        OBVIOUS
    <2>1. aa \in Acceptor
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>2. CASE VotedFor(aa, c, v)
      BY <2>2, <1>1
    <2>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(aa, c)
      <3>1. maxBal'[aa] > c
        BY <2>3, <2>1, <1>2, QuorumAssumption
      <3>2. \A vv \in Value : ~ VotedFor(aa, c, vv)'
        BY <2>3, <1>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <1>5
  <1> QED BY <1>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA SafeAtStableVoteFor ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a0 \in Acceptor, NEW b0 \in Ballot, NEW v0 \in Value,
          VoteFor(a0, b0, v0),
          NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(b, v)
   PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
  <1> USE DEF VoteFor, SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt, CannotVoteAt,
              DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>1. \A aa \in Acceptor : maxBal'[aa] >= maxBal[aa]
    OBVIOUS
  <1>2. \A aa \in Acceptor, bb \in Ballot, vv \in Value :
           VotedFor(aa, bb, vv) => VotedFor(aa, bb, vv)'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, NEW vv \in Value,
                        VotedFor(aa, bb, vv)
                 PROVE VotedFor(aa, bb, vv)'
        OBVIOUS
    <2>1. CASE aa = a0
      <3>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<b0, v0>>}
        BY <2>1
      <3> QED BY <3>1
    <2>2. CASE aa # a0
      <3>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa]
        BY <2>2
      <3> QED BY <3>1
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>5. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, c)
    BY <1>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>6. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, c)'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                 PROVE VotedFor(aa, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, c)'
        OBVIOUS
    <2>1. aa \in Acceptor
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>2. CASE VotedFor(aa, c, v)
      BY <2>2, <1>2, <2>1
    <2>3. CASE CannotVoteAt(aa, c) /\ ~VotedFor(aa, c, v)
      <3>1. maxBal'[aa] > c
        BY <2>3, <2>1, <1>1
      <3>2. \A vv \in Value : ~ VotedFor(aa, c, vv)'
        <4> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW vv \in Value, VotedFor(aa, c, vv)'
                     PROVE FALSE
            OBVIOUS
        <4>1. CASE aa = a0
          <5>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa] \cup {<<b0, v0>>}
            BY <4>1
          <5>2. <<c, vv>> \in votes[aa] \cup {<<b0, v0>>}
            BY <5>1
          <5>3. CASE <<c, vv>> \in votes[aa]
            BY <5>3, <2>3
          <5>4. CASE <<c, vv>> = <<b0, v0>>
            <6>1. c = b0
              BY <5>4
            <6>2. maxBal[a0] <= b0
              OBVIOUS
            <6>3. maxBal[aa] <= c
              BY <6>1, <6>2, <4>1
            <6> QED BY <6>3, <2>3, <2>1
          <5> QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <5>4
        <4>2. CASE aa # a0
          <5>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa]
            BY <4>2
          <5> QED BY <5>1, <2>3
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <1>5
  <1> QED BY <1>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA SafeAtStable ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, Next, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(b, v)
   PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
  <1>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, IncreaseMaxBal(a, bb)
        PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
    BY <1>1, SafeAtStableIncreaseMaxBal
  <1>2. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, NEW vv \in Value, VoteFor(a, bb, vv)
        PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
    BY <1>2, SafeAtStableVoteFor
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Next

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
LEMMA ShowsSafetyLemma ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot,
          NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
          ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
   PROVE SafeAt(b, v)
  <1> USE DEF SafeAt, ShowsSafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt, CannotVoteAt,
              VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor,
              TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>1. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
          /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
          /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
    OBVIOUS
  <1>2. \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] >= b
    OBVIOUS
  <1>3. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW e \in 0..(b-1)
                 PROVE NoneOtherChoosableAt(e, v)
    BY DEF SafeAt
  <1>4. CASE e \in (c+1)..(b-1)
    <2>1. \A a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, e)
      BY <1>4, <1>1
    <2>2. \A a \in Q : a \in Acceptor /\ maxBal[a] > e
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE a \in Acceptor /\ maxBal[a] > e
          OBVIOUS
      <3>1. a \in Acceptor
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>2. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
        BY <3>1
      <3>3. maxBal[a] >= b
        BY <1>2
      <3>4. e < b
        OBVIOUS
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <3>4
    <2>3. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, e)
      BY <2>1, <2>2 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>5. CASE e \in 0..c
    <2>1. c # -1
      BY <1>5
    <2>2. PICK a0 \in Q : VotedFor(a0, c, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>1
    <2>3. a0 \in Acceptor
      BY QuorumAssumption
    <2>4. SafeAt(c, v)
      BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF SafeAt, VotedFor
    <2>5. c \in Ballot
      BY <2>1
    <2>6. CASE e = c
      <3>1. CASE c = 0
        <4>1. NoneOtherChoosableAt(0, v)
          <5>1. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, 0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, 0)
            <6> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                         PROVE VotedFor(a, 0, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, 0)
                OBVIOUS
            <6>1. a \in Acceptor
              BY QuorumAssumption
            <6>2. CASE VotedFor(a, 0, v)
              BY <6>2
            <6>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, 0, v)
              <7>1. \A vv \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, 0, vv)
                <8> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW vv \in Value, VotedFor(a, 0, vv)
                             PROVE FALSE
                    OBVIOUS
                <8>1. VotedFor(a0, c, v)
                  BY <2>2
                <8>2. VotedFor(a0, 0, v)
                  BY <3>1, <8>1
                <8>3. vv = v
                  BY <8>2, <6>1, <2>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot
                <8> QED BY <8>3, <6>3
              <7>2. maxBal[a] > 0
                <8>1. maxBal[a] >= b
                  BY <1>2
                <8>2. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
                  BY <6>1
                <8>3. b > 0 \/ b = 0
                  BY DEF Ballot
                <8>4. CASE b > 0
                  BY <8>1, <8>2, <8>4
                <8>5. CASE b = 0
                  <9>1. c \in 0..(b-1)
                    BY <2>5
                  <9>2. c < b
                    BY <9>1
                  <9>3. FALSE
                    BY <8>5, <9>2, <2>5
                  <9> QED BY <9>3
                <8> QED BY <8>4, <8>5, <8>3
              <7> QED BY <7>1, <7>2 DEF CannotVoteAt, DidNotVoteAt
            <6> QED BY <6>2, <6>3
          <5> QED BY <5>1 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
        <4>2. e = 0
          BY <2>6, <3>1
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2
      <3>2. CASE c > 0
        <4>1. c - 1 \in 0..(c-1)
          BY <3>2, <2>5
        <4>2. e = c
          BY <2>6
        <4>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)
          <5>1. PICK Q1 \in Quorum :
                  \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, c-1, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c-1)
            BY <2>4, <4>1 DEF SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt
          <5>2. PICK a1 \in Q1 \cap Q : TRUE
            BY QuorumAssumption
          <5>3. a1 \in Acceptor
            BY <5>2, QuorumAssumption
          <5>4. VotedFor(a1, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a1, c)
            <6>1. CASE VotedFor(a1, c-1, v)
              <7>1. ~VotedFor(a1, c, v) => CannotVoteAt(a1, c)
                <8> SUFFICES ASSUME ~VotedFor(a1, c, v)
                             PROVE CannotVoteAt(a1, c)
                    OBVIOUS
                <8> QED BY <6>1, <2>3, <2>2, <5>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, CannotVoteAt
              <7> QED BY <7>1
            <6>2. CASE CannotVoteAt(a1, c-1)
              <7>1. maxBal[a1] > c - 1
                BY <6>2 DEF CannotVoteAt
              <7>2. maxBal[a1] \in Ballot \cup {-1}
                BY <5>3
              <7>3. maxBal[a1] >= c
                BY <7>1, <7>2 DEF Ballot
              <7>4. CASE VotedFor(a1, c, v)
                BY <7>4
              <7>5. CASE ~VotedFor(a1, c, v)
                <8>1. \A vv \in Value : ~VotedFor(a1, c, vv)
                  BY <7>5, <2>2, <5>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot
                <8>2. CASE c > 0
                  <9>1. maxBal[a1] > c
                    <10>1. CASE maxBal[a1] = c
                      <11>1. SafeAt(c, v)
                        BY <2>4
                      <11>2. c - 1 \in 0..(c-1)
                        BY <8>2, <2>5
                      <11>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c-1, v)
                        BY <11>1, <11>2 DEF SafeAt
                      <11> QED BY <10>1, <6>2 DEF CannotVoteAt
                    <10>2. CASE maxBal[a1] > c
                      BY <10>2
                    <10> QED BY <10>1, <10>2, <7>3
                  <9> QED BY <9>1, <8>1 DEF CannotVoteAt, DidNotVoteAt
                <8>3. CASE c = 0
                  <9>1. FALSE
                    BY <8>3, <6>2 DEF CannotVoteAt
                  <9> QED BY <9>1
                <8> QED BY <8>2, <8>3, <2>5
              <7> QED BY <7>4, <7>5
            <6> QED BY <6>1, <6>2, <5>2
          <5> QED BY <5>4, <5>2 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <4>3
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <2>5 DEF Ballot
    <2>7. CASE e < c
      <3>1. SafeAt(c, v)
        BY <2>4
      <3>2. e \in 0..(c-1)
        BY <2>7, <1>5
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF SafeAt
    <2> QED BY <2>6, <2>7, <1>5
  <1> QED BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>1 DEF Ballot

LEMMA NextOneValuePerBallot ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, Next
   PROVE OneValuePerBallot'
  <1> USE DEF OneValuePerBallot, VotedFor, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, IncreaseMaxBal(a, bb)
        PROVE OneValuePerBallot'
    BY <1>1 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
  <1>2. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, NEW vv \in Value, VoteFor(a, bb, vv)
        PROVE OneValuePerBallot'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                        NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                        VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
                 PROVE v1 = v2
        OBVIOUS
    <2>1. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
      BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
    <2>2. CASE a1 = a /\ a2 = a
      <3>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <2>1
      <3>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>1, <2>2
      <3>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>1, <2>2
      <3>4. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a] /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a]
        BY <3>4, <2>2
      <3>5. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<bb, vv>> /\ <<b, v2>> = <<bb, vv>>
        BY <3>5
      <3>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a] /\ <<b, v2>> = <<bb, vv>>
        <4>1. \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # bb
          BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
        <4>2. b = bb
          BY <3>6
        <4>3. FALSE
          BY <3>6, <4>1, <4>2
        <4> QED BY <4>3
      <3>7. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<bb, vv>> /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a]
        <4>1. \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # bb
          BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
        <4>2. b = bb
          BY <3>7
        <4>3. FALSE
          BY <3>7, <4>1, <4>2
        <4> QED BY <4>3
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3, <3>4, <3>5, <3>6, <3>7
    <2>3. CASE a1 = a /\ a2 # a
      <3>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <2>1, <2>3
      <3>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2]
        BY <2>1, <2>3
      <3>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>1
      <3>4. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2]
        BY <3>2
      <3>5. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a]
        BY <3>5, <3>4, <2>3
      <3>6. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<bb, vv>>
        <4>1. b = bb /\ v1 = vv
          BY <3>6
        <4>2. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} : \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = bb) => (vt[2] = vv)
          BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
        <4>3. a2 \in Acceptor \ {a}
          BY <2>3
        <4>4. <<b, v2>>[1] = bb
          BY <4>1
        <4>5. <<b, v2>>[2] = vv
          BY <4>2, <4>3, <4>4, <3>4
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>3, <3>5, <3>6
    <2>4. CASE a1 # a /\ a2 = a
      <3>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a1]
        BY <2>1, <2>4
      <3>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <2>1, <2>4
      <3>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1]
        BY <3>1
      <3>4. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
        BY <3>2
      <3>5. CASE <<b, v2>> \in votes[a]
        BY <3>5, <3>3, <2>4
      <3>6. CASE <<b, v2>> = <<bb, vv>>
        <4>1. b = bb /\ v2 = vv
          BY <3>6
        <4>2. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} : \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = bb) => (vt[2] = vv)
          BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
        <4>3. a1 \in Acceptor \ {a}
          BY <2>4
        <4>4. <<b, v1>>[1] = bb
          BY <4>1
        <4>5. <<b, v1>>[2] = vv
          BY <4>2, <4>3, <4>4, <3>3
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>5
      <3> QED BY <3>4, <3>5, <3>6
    <2>5. CASE a1 # a /\ a2 # a
      <3>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a1]
        BY <2>1, <2>5
      <3>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2]
        BY <2>1, <2>5
      <3>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1]
        BY <3>1
      <3>4. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2]
        BY <3>2
      <3> QED BY <3>3, <3>4
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Next

LEMMA NextVotesSafe ==
   ASSUME TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, Next
   PROVE VotesSafe'
  <1> USE DEF VotesSafe, VotedFor, TypeOK, Ballot
  <1>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, IncreaseMaxBal(a, bb)
        PROVE VotesSafe'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                        VotedFor(aa, b, v)'
                 PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
        BY DEF VotesSafe
    <2>1. votes' = votes
      BY <1>1 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <2>2. VotedFor(aa, b, v)
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. SafeAt(b, v)
      BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe
    <2>4. TypeOK
      OBVIOUS
    <2> QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <1>1, SafeAtStable DEF Next
  <1>2. ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW bb \in Ballot, NEW vv \in Value, VoteFor(a, bb, vv)
        PROVE VotesSafe'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                        VotedFor(aa, b, v)'
                 PROVE SafeAt(b, v)'
        BY DEF VotesSafe
    <2>1. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}]
      BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
    <2>2. CASE VotedFor(aa, b, v)
      <3>1. SafeAt(b, v)
        BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe
      <3>2. TypeOK
        OBVIOUS
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <1>2, SafeAtStable DEF Next
    <2>3. CASE ~VotedFor(aa, b, v)
      <3>1. CASE aa = a
        <4>1. votes'[aa] = votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
          BY <2>1, <3>1
        <4>2. <<b, v>> \in votes'[aa]
          OBVIOUS
        <4>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] \cup {<<bb, vv>>}
          BY <4>1, <4>2
        <4>4. <<b, v>> = <<bb, vv>>
          BY <4>3, <2>3, <3>1
        <4>5. b = bb /\ v = vv
          BY <4>4
        <4>6. \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, bb, vv)
          BY <1>2 DEF VoteFor
        <4>7. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, bb, vv)
          BY <4>6
        <4>8. SafeAt(bb, vv)
          BY <4>7, ShowsSafetyLemma
        <4>9. SafeAt(b, v)
          BY <4>5, <4>8
        <4>10. TypeOK
          OBVIOUS
        <4> QED BY <4>9, <4>10, <1>2, SafeAtStable DEF Next
      <3>2. CASE aa # a
        <4>1. votes'[aa] = votes[aa]
          BY <2>1, <3>2
        <4>2. VotedFor(aa, b, v)
          BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
        <4> QED BY <4>2, <2>3
      <3> QED BY <3>1, <3>2
    <2> QED BY <2>2, <2>3
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Next

LEMMA NextInv ==
   ASSUME Inv, Next
   PROVE Inv'
  <1>1. TypeOK
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>2. VotesSafe
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>3. OneValuePerBallot
    BY DEF Inv
  <1>4. TypeOK'
    BY <1>1, NextTypeOK
  <1>5. VotesSafe'
    BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, NextVotesSafe
  <1>6. OneValuePerBallot'
    BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, NextOneValuePerBallot
  <1> QED BY <1>4, <1>5, <1>6 DEF Inv

LEMMA StutterInv ==
   ASSUME Inv, UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
   PROVE Inv'
  <1> USE DEF Inv, TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, SafeAt,
              NoneOtherChoosableAt, CannotVoteAt, DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
  <1> QED OBVIOUS

LEMMA Invariance == Spec => []Inv
  <1>1. Init => Inv
    BY InitInv
  <1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>> => Inv'
    <2> SUFFICES ASSUME Inv, [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
                 PROVE Inv'
        OBVIOUS
    <2>1. CASE Next
      BY <2>1, NextInv
    <2>2. CASE UNCHANGED <<votes, maxBal>>
      BY <2>2, StutterInv
    <2> QED BY <2>1, <2>2
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec

LEMMA InvImpliesConsistency ==
   ASSUME Inv
   PROVE Consistency
  <1> USE DEF Inv, TypeOK, VotesSafe, OneValuePerBallot, Consistency,
              chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, SafeAt, NoneOtherChoosableAt,
              CannotVoteAt, DidNotVoteAt, Ballot
  <1>1. CASE chosen = {}
    BY <1>1
  <1>2. CASE chosen # {}
    <2>1. PICK v1 \in Value : v1 \in chosen
      BY <1>2
    <2>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1)
      BY <2>1
    <2>3. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
      BY <2>2
    <2>4. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v2 \in chosen
                   PROVE v2 = v1
        BY <2>1
    <2>5. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2)
      BY <2>4
    <2>6. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
      BY <2>5
    <2>7. v2 \in Value
      BY <2>4
    <2>8. CASE b1 = b2
      <3>1. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>2. a \in Acceptor
        BY <3>1, QuorumAssumption
      <3>3. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
        BY <3>1, <2>3
      <3>4. VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
        BY <3>1, <2>6
      <3>5. VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
        BY <3>4, <2>8
      <3> QED BY <3>2, <3>3, <3>5
    <2>9. CASE b1 < b2
      <3>1. SafeAt(b2, v2)
        <4>1. PICK aa \in Q2 : VotedFor(aa, b2, v2)
          BY <2>6, QuorumNonEmpty
        <4>2. aa \in Acceptor
          BY <4>1, QuorumAssumption
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2 DEF VotesSafe
      <3>2. b1 \in 0..(b2-1)
        BY <2>9 DEF Ballot
      <3>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2)
        BY <3>1, <3>2
      <3>4. PICK Q3 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
        BY <3>3
      <3>5. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>6. a \in Acceptor
        BY <3>5, QuorumAssumption
      <3>7. VotedFor(a, b1, v1)
        BY <3>5, <2>3
      <3>8. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
        BY <3>5, <3>4
      <3>9. CASE VotedFor(a, b1, v2)
        BY <3>6, <3>7, <3>9
      <3>10. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b1)
        <4>1. \A vv \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b1, vv)
          BY <3>10
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <3>7
      <3> QED BY <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
    <2>10. CASE b1 > b2
      <3>1. SafeAt(b1, v1)
        <4>1. PICK aa \in Q1 : VotedFor(aa, b1, v1)
          BY <2>3, QuorumNonEmpty
        <4>2. aa \in Acceptor
          BY <4>1, QuorumAssumption
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <4>2 DEF VotesSafe
      <3>2. b2 \in 0..(b1-1)
        BY <2>10 DEF Ballot
      <3>3. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1)
        BY <3>1, <3>2
      <3>4. PICK Q3 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q3 : VotedFor(a, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
        BY <3>3
      <3>5. PICK a \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE
        BY QuorumAssumption
      <3>6. a \in Acceptor
        BY <3>5, QuorumAssumption
      <3>7. VotedFor(a, b2, v2)
        BY <3>5, <2>6
      <3>8. VotedFor(a, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
        BY <3>5, <3>4
      <3>9. CASE VotedFor(a, b2, v1)
        BY <3>6, <3>7, <3>9
      <3>10. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, b2)
        <4>1. \A vv \in Value : ~VotedFor(a, b2, vv)
          BY <3>10
        <4> QED BY <4>1, <3>7
      <3> QED BY <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
    <2> QED BY <2>8, <2>9, <2>10 DEF Ballot
  <1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
THEOREM Consistent == Spec => []Consistency
<1>1. Spec => []Inv
  BY Invariance
<1>2. []Inv => []Consistency
  <2>1. Inv => Consistency
    BY InvImpliesConsistency
  <2> QED BY <2>1, PTL
<1> QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

    <2>3. \A a \in Q : CannotVoteAt(a, e)

    <2>3. a0 \in Acceptor

    <2>4. SafeAt(c, v)

    <2>5. c \in Ballot

    <2>6. CASE e = c

                OBVIOUS
            <6>1. a \in Acceptor

            <6>3. CASE ~VotedFor(a, 0, v)

    <2>3. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, e, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, e)
      <3> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q

        BY QuorumAssumption

        BY <3>1
      <3>3. maxBal[a] >= b

      <3>4. e < b
        OBVIOUS
      <3>5. maxBal[a] > e
        BY <3>2, <3>3, <3>4 DEF Ballot
      <3>6. DidNotVoteAt(a, e)
        BY <2>2
      <3> QED BY <3>5, <3>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <2> QED BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <1>5. CASE e <= c
